description_en: Brazil's largest southern sea-port benchmark for soy and corn exports.
caveats: Southern benchmark endpoint; no local low-water shock assigned.

description_en: Southern export endpoint and benchmark for producer-price basis comparisons.
caveats: Southern benchmark endpoint; no local low-water shock assigned.

description_en: Southern comparison port in Rio Grande do Sul.
caveats: Southern benchmark endpoint; no linked water series in the v3 dashboard spine.

description_en: Northern export endpoint serving Cerrado grain through road and rail corridors.
caveats: Endpoint layer; not the same as inland water-leg exposure.

description_en: Lower Amazon export endpoint receiving barge flows from Tapajos corridors.
caveats: No usable local gauge; do not assign zero shock.

description_en: Tapajos-Amazon river port and final export endpoint for some northern grain flows.
caveats: Gauge may include lower Amazon/tidal features.

description_en: Amazon mainstem port and industrial import node with a documented 17.7 m surcharge trigger.
caveats: Important for imports and mainstem operations; not a pure grain export hub.

description_en: Downstream Madeira-Amazon endpoint for barge-to-ocean grain logistics.
caveats: Station represents a downstream leg, not Porto Velho conditions.

description_en: Lower Amazon port in the northern export system.
caveats: Endpoint layer; local gauge not used.

description_en: Amapa-side Amazon export endpoint.
caveats: Endpoint layer; local gauge not used.

description_en: Eastern seaport used as a comparison endpoint in Comex classifications.
caveats: Not a northern water-leg shock.

description_en: Northeast sea port included for port completeness.
caveats: Not central to the grain corridor design.

description_en: Southern grain-relevant export endpoint.
caveats: Comparison endpoint.

description_en: Southern PortWatch/port layer endpoint.
caveats: Comparison endpoint.

description_en: Southern PortWatch endpoint included for completeness.
caveats: Comparison endpoint.

description_en: Barge-loading terminal on the Tapajos where Mato Grosso trucks transfer grain to river barges.
caveats: Hub layer; not a final port_of_export in Trase.

description_en: Tapajos river node used to measure the water leg serving Miritituba transshipment.
caveats: Gauge/hub layer; not a meaningful final export endpoint.

description_en: Madeira River transshipment hub where western Mato Grosso and Rondonia grain enters barges.
caveats: Hub layer; 4 m rule needs station-datum caveat.

description_en: Upper Paraguay river port complex, hydrologically separate from the Amazon corridors.
caveats: Include Ladario when matching tonnage.

description_en: Paraguay river node included for corridor completeness.
caveats: Coverage is partial.
